facebook.content:
Hey friends, I want to remind you that worship is not just a feeling, it's a lifestyle. It's a choice to praise God in every moment, no matter what's happening around us. Join us this Saturday at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI, for a powerful time of praise and worship. Or, join us daily online for our Hour of Power, Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live. Where will you choose to worship today?

Who's joining us this Saturday?

instagram.content: Join us for a moment of pure worship. Our monthly in-person gathering is this Saturday at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI. But don't think you have to miss it – join us daily online for Hour of Power, Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live. Come and breathe in the presence of God. Who's joining us in spirit?
